page: Microsoft Azure E32as_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the EASv5 server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with simultaneous multithreading enabled, operating at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. No local storage is bundled with this instance, though it is Premium Storage capable, and it does not include any GPU accelerators.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU performance, as evidenced by stress-ng single-core tests and strong image processing capabilities in Geekbench. Multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations fall within the average tier. Large block memory bandwidth reads reach 77.88 GB/sec, while writes register at 44.48 GB/sec. Large-scale LLM inference on a 70B model is weak, but text generation on smaller 135M models is strong.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E32as_v5 offers a high-density memory configuration relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads without the overhead of local storage. This server is suited for relational database management systems, in-memory caching layers like Redis, data analytics, and memory-heavy enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E32as_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the EASv5 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 x86_64 processor. It features 32 dedicated vCPUs across 16 physical cores running at 3.525 GHz, paired with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high 8.0 GB per core memory allocation. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators but is Premium Storage capable. Benchmark data shows strong single-core CPU and image processing performance, alongside average multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and database execution speeds. This high memory density relative to compute resources makes it a cost-efficient choice for memory-bound workloads. The E32as_v5 is suited for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, and data processing applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32as_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs and 256 GB of RAM. It is suited for memory-intensive enterprise workloads and database operations.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32as_v5 is a memory-optimized VM with 32 AMD EPYC vCPUs and 256 GB RAM, suited for databases and memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high RAM-to-vCPU density and dedicated AMD EPYC processing for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

Equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM for memory-intensive applications

No bundled local storage, but supports Premium Storage options
